name: Diabetic Sweetener-Sugar Equivalents
recipeInstructions:
Sprinkle sweet and Sugar twin 1 teaspoon (tsp) for 1 tsp sugar.
Sweet n'low- 1/3 teaspoon (tsp) for 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) sugar. Liquid
Sucaryl-1 tablespoon (Tbsp) for 1/2 cup (cup) sugar. Adolph's Sugar
Substitute-1/4 teaspoon (tsp) for 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) of sugar. Liquid
Sweet 10- 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) for 3/4 cup (cup) sugar, 4 teaspoons (tsp) for 1 cup (cup) sugar. Weight Watchers- 1/8 teaspoon (tsp) for 1 tsp sugar, 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) for 1/2 cup (cup) sugar. Sweet 10 tablets and Equal tablets- 1 tablet for 1 tsp sugar. Equal granulated- 1 packet for 2 teaspoons (tsp) sugar. From the New Diabetic Cookbook. From Prodigy's Food and Wine Bulletin Board.
